# shelly_cloud_config (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address of the Shelly device.

### Optional

- `enable` (Boolean) True if cloud connection is enabled, false otherwise
- `server` (String) Name of the server to which the device is connected
